response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'Mela!' from top-left text and matched with Ryokuoushoku Shakai. 2. Identified 'Seiza ni Naretara' from bottom text and matched with Kessoku Band. 3. Used DuckDuckGo to search for lyrics in Japanese and English for both songs using standard templates. 4. Compiled information into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: This video features a concert performance of two J-Pop/J-Rock songs. The first song, 'Mela!', is performed by a group of VTubers, and the second song, 'Seiza ni Naretara', is also performed by VTubers, with on-screen credits provided for the second song.

scenes.description: VTubers perform the song 'Mela!' on a stage with a castle background. Text 'Mela!' appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 今なんじゃない？ / メラメラとたぎれ / 眠っているだけの正義 / こんな僕も君のヒーローになりたいのさ / かっこいい君には / 僕じゃ頼りないのかなんて / そりゃそうだよな / だって今もこうして迷ってる / 手を取ってくれないか / ギブとテイクさ / 僕だけを信じてくれないか / ヒーローになりたいのさ...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Isn't it now or never? / There's this flaming sense of justice / I want to be your hero too / Am I unreliable to the cool you? / That's right / Because even now I'm hesitating / Won't you take my hand? / It's give and take / Can you trust me? / I want to be your hero / Just like that...

scenes.description: VTubers perform the song 'Seiza ni Naretara'. Text '星座になれたら' and writing credits appear on the bottom of the screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: もうすぐ時計は6時 / もうそこに一番星 / 影を踏んで夜に紛れたくなる帰り道 / どんなに探してみても / ひとつしかない星 / 君と集まって星座になれたら / 流星みたい流れる独り言 / 消えてゆく残像は真夜中のプリズム / 君と集まって星座になれたら / 切なる願い誰かに届いたら / 変われるかな夜の縁を / なぞるようなこんな僕でも...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: It's almost six o'clock / The evening star's already out there / Walking the path home, I want to blend into the night, stepping on shadows / No matter how much I search / There's only one star / I want to become a constellation with you / Like a comet, my mutterings flow by / The fading afterimage is a midnight prism / If I could become a constellation with you...
